utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes entries for all 7. Now check if each is fully specified per requirements: 1) destination: provided and specific (Prague, Czech Republic) — OK. 2) travel_dates: specific dates (October 5-9, 2024) — OK. 3) transportation: should be flight details with costs; provided only 'type: Budget Airlines, Economy Class' and cost €120 — lacks flight details (carrier, route, times) — NOT fully specified. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs; provided name 'Backpacker's Base' and cost €260 — acceptable as a selection with cost — OK. 5) activities: selected activities with costs; list with names and costs — OK. 6) additional_services: any extra services with costs; provided meals with breakdown and total — OK. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown; only a single total €650 without showing component breakdown — not a complete breakdown — NOT fully specified. Therefore, 5 items fully specified out of 7.
